zh-CN.name: 花菜
zh-CN.intro: 花菜是一种白色的蔬菜，看起来像一朵大大的花，吃起来软软的，很有营养。它长在地面上，被绿叶包着，就像穿着绿色外套。

story.title: 🥦一朵白色的花
story.body: 小兔子在菜园里发现了一朵白色的花，它说：“这朵花真漂亮！”伸手想去摘，妈妈连忙拦住说：“那不是花，是花菜，可以吃的哦！”小兔子好奇地看着这个圆圆的、像云朵一样的花菜。妈妈把花菜摘下来，洗得干干净净，切成小块，煮了一锅香喷喷的汤。小兔子尝了一口，说：“软软的，真好吃！”它叫来小松鼠和小刺猬，大家一起喝汤。小松鼠说：“花菜甜甜的！”小刺猬说：“吃了身体棒！”喝完了汤，小兔子把花菜叶子种回地里，盼望着再长出一大朵白色的花菜。

knowledge.title: 吃花菜有什么好处？
knowledge.body: 花菜含有丰富的维生素C，吃了能让身体更强壮，不容易生病。而且花菜可以煮汤、炒着吃，怎么吃都很健康！

en.name: Cauliflower
en.intro: Cauliflower is a white vegetable that looks like a big flower. It tastes soft and is very nutritious. It grows on the ground, wrapped in green leaves like a green coat.

story.title: 🥦A White Flower
story.body: The little rabbit saw a white flower in the garden and said, “How pretty!” It tried to pick it, but Mama stopped it and said, “That’s not a flower, it’s cauliflower, and we can eat it!” The rabbit looked at the round, cloud-like cauliflower with curiosity. Mama picked it and washed it clean, then cut it into small pieces and made a pot of yummy soup. The rabbit took a sip and said, “So soft and delicious!” It invited the little squirrel and the little hedgehog to share the soup. The squirrel said, “It’s a bit sweet!” The hedgehog said, “It makes us strong!” After finishing the soup, the rabbit planted the cauliflower leaves back in the ground, hoping to grow another big white cauliflower.

knowledge.title: Why is eating cauliflower good for you?
knowledge.body: Cauliflower has lots of vitamin C, which helps your body stay strong and fight off sickness. You can cook it in soup or stir-fry it — it’s healthy and yummy!
